name: Murf the Surf: Jewels, Jesus, and Mayhem in the USA
original_name: Murf the Surf: Jewels, Jesus, and Mayhem in the USA
overview: Ths true crime docuseries pulls back the curtain on America’s most infamous jewel thief, Jack Roland Murphy, who played a key role in the 1964 burglary of the jewel collection of New York’s American Museum of Natural History.
